activation.note: Clean-funnel row added 2026-07-19 from a founder/QA/bot-excluded PostHog read (projects 171597 + 270848, 90d) filed as executive-os/ACTIVATION-AUTOPSY-2026-07-19.md and per-repo docs/plans/2026-07-19-activation-cliff-fix-plan.md. Exclusions: founder person, +fable-qa*/+export-wall* aliases, is_internal_tester (45 persons / 1,216 events in Resumely), burst chains >=3 events/sec, and RunSmart behavioural founder/QA heuristics (>=6 sessions or >=3 app versions). Mature founder-excluded D7 from 2026-07-12 remains the decision contract; the clean-funnel row is diagnostic, not a replacement cohort. Correction: free_ats_completed DOES carry score_bucket — live 90d is 5x '0-40' + 5x '41-60', so every real free-ATS user saw <=60.
